title: 升级到 gpt-5.6, 10 分钟用了 10% 的额度
content: A user reports rapid consumption of API credits after upgrading to GPT-5.6. On a $100 Pro plan, 10% of quota was used in 10 minutes using the mid-tier Terra model, faster than previous week-long usage. Within hours, remaining quota dropped from 20% to 4% in a 5-hour window. The user notes avoiding the flagship Sol model yet still experiencing unexpectedly fast depletion.

title: 如何看待丘成桐回应「清华求真书院有学生未过考核」称将进一步改革招生方式，希望招到真正热爱数学的学生？
content: Tsinghua's Qiuzhen College, led by mathematician Shing-Tung Yau, will reform its admissions after some 2026 preparatory students failed assessments. Yau criticized the "training" industry that teaches test-taking tricks rather than genuine mathematical thinking. He seeks students with true passion, curiosity, imagination, and perseverance—not those using math as a shortcut to elite universities. The college aims to cultivate future mathematics researchers through an eight-year bachelor's-to-PhD program, but commercial cram courses targeting its entrance exams have undermined this goal.

title: 小米终于给中年人造车了
content: Xiaomi unveiled the "Pengcheng" (SkyNomad) extended-range EV series on July 9, targeting middle-aged buyers rather than its traditional young customer base. The full-size SUV features a boxy design, 5.3-meter length, 6/7-seat configurations, and a 1.5T range extender with over 44% thermal efficiency. Priced around $48,000-$62,000, it competes with the AITO M9 and Li Auto L9. Key selling points include flexible interior space with rotating seats and flat floors. However, analysts suggest Xiaomi faces challenges in winning pragmatic middle-aged consumers who prioritize value, luxury features, and resale value over novelty.

title: Preempt_none Is Dead; Your Postgres Probably Doesn't Care
content: The article discusses that preempt_none, a Linux kernel scheduling option, is no longer relevant for most PostgreSQL deployments. title: 电车刚开四年就 “ 老了 ”，还有这规矩？
content: New energy vehicles depreciate faster than gasoline cars due to rapid technology cycles. While fuel vehicles average 8.2 years in age with mature used-car pricing based on mechanical condition, EVs average just 1.8 years, and their value depends heavily on "digital assets"—chip computing power, autonomous driving capability, and software ecosystems—that become obsolete quickly. Industry data shows fuel car replacement cycles run 6–8 years versus 3–5 years for EVs. This creates dilemmas for owners, dealers, and brands alike, as frequent model updates erode consumer trust and resale values. Buyers should separate usage costs from ownership costs, treat smart features as temporary rather than permanent assets, and choose vehicles matching their intended holding period.

title: 长十乙的「网系回收」和星舰的「筷子夹火箭」、以及猎鹰火箭相比，哪个技术难度更大，应用前景更好？
content: China's Long March 10B successfully demonstrated controlled first-stage recovery, comparable to SpaceX's Falcon 9 propulsive landing and Starship's "chopstick" tower catch. All three approaches present distinct challenges: Falcon 9 requires precise engine reignition and landing legs; Starship's tower catch demands extreme precision in trajectory and timing but eliminates landing mass; Long March 10B's grid-fin-guided, engine-landing approach similarly aims for reusability without dedicated landing hardware.

风偏低的人不断换仓买成长，风偏高的人在吃息。

title: 老登自救指南
content: "Old fogey" (老登) is Chinese internet slang mocking paternalistic authority figures who condescend to younger generations. The article identifies three key traits: substituting moral judgment for factual analysis, blurring professional boundaries with familial control, and using vague concepts to avoid accountability. This phenomenon stems from intergenerational value conflicts—older elites built success during China's economic boom and preach meritocracy, while younger people face diminished opportunities. The piece suggests remedies: material generosity, genuine cultural engagement, or simply silence. It concludes that cross-generational understanding requires respecting young people's right to express their struggles.

title: 5.6 的 Sol、Terra、Luna 应该如何选？大家可以参考一下
content: GPT-5.6 offers three models named after celestial bodies: Sol (flagship, strongest capabilities, slowest, best for complex architecture and debugging), Terra (balanced daily workhorse, moderate speed), and Luna (fastest, cheapest, ideal for batch processing and simple tasks). Pricing scales 1×/2.5×/5× respectively. Users can start conversations with Terra or Luna to save tokens, switching to Sol for long-context tasks. Reasoning levels range from Low to Ultra. Recommendation: Sol for planning and hard problems, Terra for main development, Luna for repetitive work.

title: GPT-5.6全量放送，Codex正式并入ChatGPT
content: OpenAI fully released the GPT-5.6 series on July 9, featuring three tiers: Sol, Terra, and Luna, priced at $5/$30, $2.50/$15, and $1/$6 per million tokens respectively. Sol offers high speed (750 tokens/second) and strong cost-efficiency despite trailing Claude Fable 5 on hardest tasks. Concurrently, Codex was integrated into ChatGPT as "ChatGPT Work," creating three entry points: Chat for conversation, Codex for coding, and Work for general tasks. Early users praise GPT-5.6 Sol's reliability for daily workflows over frontier benchmarks. The release reflects an industry shift toward cheaper, faster, scalable AI agents rather than raw capability alone.

title: 一夜之间，GPT-5.6 来了，Codex 没了，Claude 急了
content: OpenAI released the GPT-5.6 series: flagship Sol, balanced Terra, and budget Luna, priced at $5/$30, $2.5/$15, and $1/$6 per million tokens respectively. Codex's standalone app was discontinued and integrated into ChatGPT, forming the new "ChatGPT Work" super-agent product capable of cross-application task execution. GPT-5.6 outperformed Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 on most benchmarks, emphasizing superior cost-efficiency and speed. New features include ultra mode with up to 16 parallel agents, programmatic tool calling, and improved computer use with self-verification. The cheapest model Luna was post-trained entirely by Sol itself, signaling advancing AI self-improvement.

title: MiniMax 解禁首日大跌 20%，市值跌破千亿港元
content: MiniMax shares plunged over 20% on the first day of lock-up expiration, with market cap falling below HK$100 billion—down about HK$320 billion from its peak. In contrast, peer Zhipu AI rose over 13% on its解禁 day. The disparity stems from MiniMax's steeper解禁 ratio (~63% of shares) and higher proportion of financial investors creating selling pressure, versus Zhipu's smaller解禁 with state-backed long-term holders. MiniMax's weaker performance also reflects mixed reception of its M3 model, pricing controversies, commercialization uncertainty, and high investment phase. However, some institutions remain optimistic about its target of $1 billion annual recurring revenue by end-2026, with valuation recovery hinging on future model iteration and commercialization progress.

SensorFM is a large foundation model trained on over one trillion minutes of unlabeled wearable sensor data from five million participants across 100+ countries. Unlike traditional supervised approaches that target single health outcomes, it learns a general representation of human physiology through missingness-aware masked reconstruction, handling fragmented real-world data natively. Scaling experiments show predictable gains across data volume and model size with no saturation. Evaluated across 35 health tasks spanning cardiovascular, metabolic, sleep, and mental health, frozen SensorFM embeddings outperform feature-engineered baselines on 34 tasks. An automated "classroom" of LLM agents builds effective prediction heads, and integrating SensorFM into a Personal Health Agent produces clinician-rated summaries comparable to those using ground-truth measurements.

title: 中文舆论进入德国法庭：德国华人迷奸案Zhiting S. 获刑五年 | 原文
content: Zhiting S. was sentenced to five years in prison by a German court for drugging and raping women. The trial's distinctive feature was the defense's submission of Chinese media coverage as evidence, including articles from outlets like Der Spiegel, Southern Metropolis Daily, and Weibo posts containing the defendant's photos and Chinese name. The presiding judge noted that the defendant had been "pre-judged" by Chinese media before the verdict and would face significant social consequences upon returning to China.

title: 中国人的性生活，比“性萧条”更复杂？ | 原文
content: A 2025 Peking University-Fudan University survey reveals complex trends in Chinese sexual behavior: Gen Z shows lower sexual activity than millennials despite having partners; Gen X is more sexually liberal than younger cohorts; over 90% of recent marriages involved premarital sex, yet many still disapprove of it in principle. These findings challenge simplistic "sex recession" narratives.

content: Former Federal Reserve Chair Ben Bernanke has joined AI company Anthropic's "Long-Term Benefit Trust," which ensures corporate accountability to public mission. Bernanke will advise on AI's societal impact, with authority to appoint and remove board members and counsel top management on AI risks and key decisions. He currently serves as a distinguished fellow at the Brookings Institution and received the Nobel Prize in Economics.
